summary: A press-gaggle clip of Trump aboard Air Force One ('WASHINGTON 3:02' on the cabin display) speaking to reporters who hold a microphone up to him, recounting his discussions with Xi about Taiwan and Iran. The frames show a continuous talking-head exchange and the audio is Trump answering questions. As a raw interview/gaggle, it is out of scope.
notable_text: tweet quote: 'He does not want to see a fight for independence... on Iran... He feels strongly they can't have a nuclear weapon... and he wants them to open up the strait.'
